admin.strategy: Dense data but breathable, generous padding inside cards (p-6), sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-md max)
admin.sidebar: w-64 fixed, deep navy background, gold accents on active state

employee.strategy: Mobile-first, huge tap targets (min h-14 buttons), generous vertical spacing (gap-6)
employee.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom nav, height h-16, dark background

client.strategy: Minimal, high negative space, centered max-w-3xl constraints for forms and timelines.

components.cards: Subtle ambient shadows (shadow-sm) on admin. No purple gradients. 1px borders (border-gray-200) for definition.
components.buttons: Premium feel. Primary: Navy background, gold text/icon on hover. Or Gold background, Navy text.
components.tables: Left-aligned headers, dense padding (py-3 px-4), strict bottom borders, no vertical lines.
components.timeline: Vertical line in gold, nodes in navy. Distinctive, readable.
components.kanban: Light gray column backgrounds, white cards, subtle shadow on drag.

login_background.description: Elegant empty sofa with premium luxury curtains in the background.

client_portal_hero.description: Gold and white floral window curtain for client portal aesthetics.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Routing: Create 4 main root layouts: /login, /admin, /employee, /client.
2. Styling: Configure Tailwind with the exact colors from this JSON. Add Manrope to the global CSS via @import.
3. Admin Shell: Implement a desktop-first dashboard with a fixed deep navy (#0B1F3A) sidebar. Main content area should be off-white (#F8F7F4).
4. Admin Dashboard: Build KPI cards (today's measurements, installations, etc.). Build the Lead Kanban pipeline and Data Tables for Orders/Customers.
5. Employee App: Build a mobile-first dark theme UI (#0B1F3A background) with huge tap targets. Use large action buttons (On the way, Arrived, etc.). Include a bottom navigation bar.
6. Client Portal: Build a centered, minimal, light-themed view featuring a vertical timeline for order lifecycle and simple forms for service requests.
7. Data Attributes: Add `data-testid` to ALL buttons, inputs, links, and key informational elements.
8. Icons: Install and use `lucide-react` for all iconography.
